assetFieldNameDesc: Images found in the bound note are written into this asset field. Default: 内容图.
replaceExistingDesc: Only affects manual sync from the database context menu or command palette. Auto-sync clears confirmed empty document content, otherwise keeping the empty-result guard.
autoSyncVisibleDesc: After document image changes, images from bound block/document database items are written directly into the asset field through SiYuan attribute-view APIs. Unbound documents are skipped silently. Failed writes are not retried automatically; modify the image again or use manual sync.
noCurrentDatabase: Put the cursor in a database first, or open a document that contains a database.
noVisibleDatabase: No visible database is available to sync.
noAssetField: No asset field named ${field} was found. Create an asset field in the database first.
syncSummary: Content image sync finished: updated ${changed} rows, scanned ${scanned} rows.
